ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.text1: All content on this website (texts, images, photographs, illustrations, videos, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, software) is the exclusive property of Han-Noah MASSENGO / Studio42, unless otherwise stated, and is protected by French and international intellectual property laws.
ip.text2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, transmission, distortion, in whole or in part, of the site or its content, by any means whatsoever, and on any medium whatsoever, is prohibited without prior written authorization from Han-Noah MASSENGO. Any unauthorized use of the site or its content engages the user's liability and constitutes infringement punishable under Articles L.335-2 et seq. of the French Intellectual Property Code.

data.title: Personal Data and GDPR
data.text1: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act of January 6, 1978, as amended, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port, and limit the processing of your personal data.
data.text2: Information collected through the contact form and newsletter subscription is intended solely for Han-Noah MASSENGO to respond to your inquiries and keep you informed of news. This information is neither sold nor transferred to third parties.
data.text3: To exercise your rights or for any questions regarding the processing of your data, please contact us at: contact@hnmassengo.com

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: This site does not use advertising tracking cookies or third-party cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies for the operation of the site (Snipcart shopping cart, language preferences) are used. These cookies do not collect any personal data for commercial purposes.

law.title: Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
law.text: This site and all its content are subject to French law. In the event of a dispute relating to the use of the site, and failing amicable resolution, the French courts within the jurisdiction of the Paris Court of Appeal shall have sole jurisdiction.
